title: MikroTik NetBox 5 ax
description: The NetBox 5 ax is the solution for anyone looking for a quality and reliable connection in an outdoor environment. The device supports AP/PtP/Client modes and allows connectivity using the latest WiFi 6 in the 5 GHz band. A LAN port with speed up to 1 Gbps is available for LAN connection, also 2 RSMA female connectors are provided on the device for antenna connection. USB is also an advantage, allowing for expansion WiFi 6 AP/PtP/Client modes supported Possibility to expand device or storage functions via USB SMA female ports for antenna connection Device 24 V 1.2 A power adapter Gigabit PoE injector Socket DIN mounting kit
specsSearch: Wireless features WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11ax Type of antenna Detachable Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes USB Yes Power Power over Ethernet Yes Power type PoE, DC connector PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 15 Power via connector/terminal 24V DC Physical characteristics Design Outdoor Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 121 Height [mm] 50 Depth [mm] 245 Hardware CPU IPQ-5010 CPU frequency [MHz] 800 CPU cores 2 Internal storage [MB] 128
